response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but the fit for this specific role is weak. Hands-on C++ experience is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 plus a thesis project, far short of the mandatory 5–10 years on Windows. There is no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience (RIDE Capital is retail-investment fintech, not capital markets), and SQL exposure appears to be MySQL/MongoDB rather than deep SQL Server/Oracle work. Most recent experience centers on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang.
strengths: Long, consistent engineering career with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Experience building low-latency, high-throughput systems (DLang async I/O at Dunnhumby)
Broad technical range including some systems-level C/C++ and performance-oriented work
concerns: C++ experience is brief and dated (~2014–2015), not the required 5–10 years on Windows
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain background
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle depth; primary databases are MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets / fixed income domain
